positive: An ornate, stylized illustration of a whimsical mountain landscape at twilight. The central feature is a soaring, ancient-looking tree whose roots intertwine with jagged, phosphorescent mountains. The sky transitions from deep indigo to vibrant magenta, dotted with crescent moons and constellations of geometrically perfect stars. Include floating, luminous jellyfish-like orbs that drift through the mist. The style should be highly detailed, neo-art nouveau combined with modern minimalist tattoo flash art, featuring thick, clean black outlines and saturated, jewel-toned colors (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple). The composition must be perfectly centered, with strong vertical elements for apparel printing. High contrast, dramatic backlighting, vector-like clean edges.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoon, childish, messy, low detail, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts
